changes.text: Fixed a broken redirect that sent you to a 404 page instead of the sign-in screen when your session expired.
Driver location tracking is steadier — your trail keeps recording after switching apps or tabs, and full mileage is saved when a shift ends.
Drivers now capture the restaurant's signature when they pick up an order, for accountability.
Drivers can now choose their preferred maps app (Google Maps, Apple Maps, or Waze) for navigation, and the Navigate button is easier to find.
Driver location tracking now works on iPhone (Safari), not just Android.
Live driver tracking now records GPS location again during a shift.
Driver app: your live tracking, delivery progress, and proof-of-delivery now stay in sync across every screen, and the map shows the real order number.
Fixed a stuck Connecting indicator on the admin order page, plus clearer driver status labels and tidier empty states.
Proof-of-delivery photos now upload reliably, and if the photo cannot upload you can still finish the delivery and it syncs in the background.
If completing a delivery fails, the proof-of-delivery screen now stays open so you can retry without re-capturing.
The driver app now tells you when a delivery status update fails instead of silently doing nothing.
Drivers can advance deliveries, track location, and end shifts again.

entries.title: A brand-new driver app
entries.summary: This release is all about drivers: the driver app has been redesigned from the ground up for phones, with live shift tracking, a clearer step-by-step delivery flow, and improved reliability when many drivers are on the road at once. Our public pages are also now easier to find in search.

changes.text: The driver home screen's delivery count now always matches the list shown, and the list refreshes automatically.
The driver history screen now shows a friendly retry instead of an error page if data is briefly unavailable.
Driver history and tracking stay reliable when many drivers use the app at once.
Drivers get a clearer delivery detail screen with a step-by-step status timeline and one-tap directions.
The driver app has a refreshed, mobile-first design with live shift tracking, clearer delivery status, and light/dark themes.
Improved SEO metadata, structured data, and sitemap coverage across all public pages.

entries.title: Better order visibility and a smoother address picker
entries.summary: This update brings live driver tracking to more order views, clearer dashboards, and a friendlier way to enter delivery addresses.

changes.text: You can now follow your driver on the map in real time from your order page.
Create on-demand orders directly from your dashboard in just a few steps.
Dashboards now show pending and cancelled orders at a glance, so nothing slips through the cracks.
The address selector is easier to use, especially on your phone.
Smoothed out a few rough edges on the delivery map.
